Main_AWP.Weight: +12% to Over if Map == 'Long Sightlines' (Mirage, Dust2, Nuke A-Site)

Star_Rifler.Weight: +10% Floor on T-Side focused maps (Ancient, Anubis)
Star_Rifler.Headshot_Bonus: If Map == 'Aim_Heavy' (Mirage), add +5% to Headshot projection.

Support_IGL.Weight: -15% Kill Volume projection in Blowout wins (Focus on calling over fragging).

Logic.Kill_Stealing_Penalty: If Team_Firepower > 1.15, reduce secondary rifler projections by 0.04 KPR (Not enough kills to go around).
Logic.Solo_Carry_Buff: If only one player has Impact > 1.20, increase that player's volume floor by +18%.

MAP_SPECIFIC_KPR_DRIVERS.Nuke: Buff AWP and Outside Riflers (+10%); Penalize Support/Ramp players (-5%) unless in OT.
MAP_SPECIFIC_KPR_DRIVERS.Ancient: Heavy Mid-Round trade volume. Increase 'Over' probability for 2nd-man-in entry riflers.
MAP_SPECIFIC_KPR_DRIVERS.Inferno: High utility impact. Reduce 'Over' confidence for entry players if enemy team has elite Utility Damage stats.

THE_DONK_FACTOR_V2.Detection: Search Opponent Roster for 'Impact Rating > 1.30' or 'Entry Success > 60%'.
THE_DONK_FACTOR_V2.Adjustment: Apply 'Passive Defense' weight: Reduce aggressive rifler 'Over' confidence by 25%. Increase 'Under' probability for all players on the B-site if the star attacker focuses A-site.
